title: Ask HN: Why is VSCode so slow on large projects in 2025?
snippet: I have tried disabling all extensions but VSCode is still painfully slow with our 150k-line TypeScript codebase. IntelliSense takes 10 seconds.
author: hn_user_dan

title: VSCode memory leak in version 1.89 — tracking issue
snippet: The extension host process leaks memory and you need to restart VSCode every hour. Productivity killer.
author: hn_user_eve
